prompt: A high-end photorealistic lifestyle shot of a dark wooden bar counter. In the foreground, a crystal glass of red wine and a gourmet plate of appetizers are bathed in warm ambient lighting. A sleek, modern smartphone rests on the table, displaying a glowing teal and lime green holographic interface above the screen. The hologram shows elegant, minimalist nutrition data and charts, similar to a futuristic UI. Subtle cyberpunk aesthetic with soft blue and green neon rim lights reflecting on the glass and polished wood. Premium atmosphere, shallow depth of field, 8k resolution, cinematic composition.
negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, qr code, distorted hands, messy table, bright daylight, low resolution, cartoon, 3d render, blurry food, crowded background, yellow interface
notes: Focused on the 'Bar/Evening' setting mentioned in the post text to create a relatable lifestyle context.
Integrated the teal/green brand colors through the holographic UI and neon rim lighting.
Used 'holographic interface' to represent the FoodFlow tech without needing literal app text.
Maintained a premium, moody aesthetic to appeal to the 'evening wine/beer' demographic.
